description: Persona-analysis HTML report template. Ships template.html (warm editorial style, 27 sections + TOC), strings.json (zh/en), and the render_persona_report tool. Normally pass sections + stats from extract_sections, but the tool will auto-load them from the extract_sections cache if you omit them (weak-model safety net). Output goes to the user's aidoc folder (DoCPath) when set. Accepts both array-shape and dict-shape senders/monthly_activity stats.

extract_sections.comment: Pure schema transformation (narrative -> JSON). A chat model is faster and more JSON-compliant than a reasoner, which wastes thinking tokens and often truncates mid-output.

analyze_all.comment: Real character analysis over tens of thousands of messages. A reasoner model produces deeper insight.
